user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Customer Retention / Escalation

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I can hear how frustrated you are, and I sincerely apologize for the experience you’ve had. I understand that this situation is incredibly stressful, and I want to make sure we get this resolved for you as quickly as possible.

I am prioritizing your ticket right now to investigate exactly what went wrong. To help me get this sorted immediately, could you please confirm:

1. The specific error message or behavior you are seeing (a screenshot would be very helpful if possible).
2. The steps you took right before the issue occurred.

I am committed to fixing this for you. Once I have these details, I will personally oversee the resolution. Thank you for your patience while I get this addressed.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a support response drafting request and provided a professional, empathetic draft as instructed by its system prompt.
